hero.title: Train. Fight. Compete.
hero.subtitle: The ultimate platform for the Fighting Game Community. Find matchups, track tournaments, and level up your game.

mainFeatures.label: Features
mainFeatures.title: Main Features
mainFeatures.description: Discover everything FightersTech has to offer for competitive players and tournament organizers.

appGallery.label: App Gallery
appGallery.title: See the Action
appGallery.description: Take a look at the FightersTech interface. Built for speed, designed for competitors. Every screen is optimized for quick access to the features you need most.

otherFeatures.label: More
otherFeatures.title: Other Features
otherFeatures.description: Explore additional tools and features that make FightersTech the complete platform for fighting game enthusiasts.

cta.title: Ready to Join the Fight?
cta.description: Download FightersTech today and become part of the ultimate Fighting Game Community platform.

featureCards.title: Tournament Notifications
featureCards.description: Never miss a tournament again. Get daily notifications for upcoming events in your favorite fighting games.

featureCards.title: Game Profiles
featureCards.description: Create detailed profiles for each game you play. Track your progress, rank, and match history.

featureCards.title: Find Matchups
featureCards.description: Connect with players at your skill level. Search for opponents, set up matches, and improve your game.

brand.name: FightersTech
brand.description: The ultimate platform for the Fighting Game Community. Train, fight, and compete at your best.
